nasb.text: But as one was felling a beam, the axe head fell into the water; and he cried out and said, “Alas, my master! For it was borrowed.”

esv.text: But as one was felling a log, his axe head fell into the water, and he cried out, “Alas, my master! It was borrowed.”

cnv.text: 有一個門徒砍伐木頭的時候，斧頭掉到水裡去了。他就喊著說：“慘啦！我主啊，這斧頭是借回來的。”

ccb.text: 有个人砍树的时候，斧头掉进了水里。他大喊：“唉！师傅，这把斧头是借来的。”
